local return(function(R,V,T,G,u,r,O,t,m,Z,c,C,j,P,g,X,D,f,M,Y,l,x,a,k)l,k,t,M,P,m,f,x,Y,C,D,c,g,X,Z,j,a=777273-777273,function(R,A)local V=m(A)local T=function(T,G,u)return t(R,{T,G,u},A,V)end return T end,function(t,T,G,u)local H,q,h,Q,K,rF,J,s,YF,C,XF,cF,F,PF,mF,e,DF,O,xF,o,fF,b,uF,y,c,TF,W,p,AF,l,RF,lF,v,VF,m,U,B,w,d,X,GF,n,I,kF,E,jF,CF,N,aF,L,OF,tF,z,S,i while t do if t<8646549-749449 then if
